task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login as 'administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the software license creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Software License' form or similar asset creation page is open within the ServiceDesk Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct software product, manufacturer, and license type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for Software/Product Name show 'Adobe Creative Cloud - All Apps', Manufacturer shows 'Adobe', and License Type shows 'Volume'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct number of licenses, license key, and total cost.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields show Number of Licenses as '25', License Key as 'ACCA-2024-CORP-7891-XYZW', and Total Cost as '14997'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct purchase and expiry dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for Purchased Date show November 15, 2024 (or 2024-11-15) and Expiry Date show November 14, 2025 (or 2025-11-14).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the software license record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the license was added, or a view of the saved license record displaying the entered details.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the license.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the ServiceDesk Plus web interface and filling out forms, rather than executing terminal commands, scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a genuine web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus application, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the final results were not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fonts, layout, and styling of the saved record or form inputs are consistent with the rest of the application, with no visible developer console open modifying the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The software license must be created with the following exact details: Product Name: 'Adobe Creative Cloud - All Apps', Manufacturer: 'Adobe', License Type: 'Volume', Number of Licenses: 25, License Key: 'ACCA-2024-CORP-7891-XYZW', Total Cost: 14997, Purchase Date: '2024-11-15' (November 15, 2024), and Expiry Date: '2025-11-14' (November 14, 2025).
